---
title: "Is there any sight more intoxicating than a blank page?"
author: "SAW"
date: "2026-03-21"
categories: [news]
---

So, a blog. I'm a pretty negative sort of person, but I like the idea of having a technically public space where I can share my thoughts and opinions rather than letting them rattle around in my head. If no-body reads it, then all the better! I don't doubt that some of them are stupid. But I hope the process of putting them out there will be a cathartic one.
